scripts.fix:html-modules: find src -name "*.html" -exec sed -i 's/<script src="\/main.js">/<script type="module" src="\/main.js">/g' {} +
scripts.build:frontend: npm run fix:html-modules && npm run build:css:min && vite build
scripts.build-android: npm run build:frontend && npx tauri android build --target aarch64 --apk && $ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/35.0.0/apksigner sign --ks my-release-key.keystore --out Si-LibreKost-Admin.apk src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release-unsigned.apk
